race.comment: Leaning to MRS IGLESIA (12) who presents third up. She tried hard last start at Cranbourne over 955m behind Gentle Steel, who has since won in good company on Saturday. She should be peaking now and is good enough to take this out. JENNYANYDOTS (2) wasn't far away here last start in a competitive race having placed first up. Back to 1000m suits and she'll be flashing late. TIZ WORTHY (7) dashed best in a slowly run race at Pakenham last time to score as favourite. She'll drift back but can certainly win again if the race shape works out. DON'T RUSSIA (8) is racing consistently and has each-way claims.
